_comment: Cached CUDA-index <-> PCI-bus map for this box. Keys are bus_key() form 'DDDD:BB:dd' (domain:bus:device, NO .function suffix) -- must match gpu_status.py bus_key(). The map is stable until the host reboots, so normal runs reuse it and only refresh live VRAM/usage via rocm-smi (no torch probe). Invalidated automatically when boot_id changes. Re-seed with: gpu_status.py --remap  (run where torch sees all GPUs; host + empty containers report 'No HIP GPUs' -- use a GPU-healthy container).
source: torch probe inside container v0.5.13-rocm720-mi35x-20260614_marv (host + empty containers report 'No HIP GPUs')
